Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce event log with case_id = order_id, activity name, timestamp, resource/actor optional, other attributes. We need to derive events: - Order Created: from Orders table; resource: sales_person_id (maybe resource_name from Resources table). - Items Picked event(s) from the Order Lines table. - Order Dispatched and Order Arrived events from the Delivery table. - Invoice Issued event from the Invoice table. - Payment Received event from the Payments table.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Items Picked: possibly one event per line item? Or summarized: could be Items Picked event with timestamp maybe earliest picking date, or multiple events per line. The instruction: You may define additional events as needed if the data supports them. Likely we produce per line item event: Activity Item Picked. Include item_id and quantity as other attribute.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets compute events: Orders (order_id, order_date, sales_person_id): 1001: order_date 2024-01-01T09:00:00Z, sales_person_id SP-001 (Alice Brown) 1002: 2024-01-02T12:30:00Z, SP-002 (Bob Smith) ... Order Lines: - 1001 ITEM-001 qty2 picker WH-001 (David Lin) date 2024-01-02T10:15:00Z ... Delivery: - DLV-5001 order 1001 dispatch 2024-01-03T08:30:00Z ... Invoice: - INV-1001 order 1001 issue 2024-01-06T09:00:00Z ... Payments: - PAY-2001 invoice INV-1001 date 2024-01-10T11:30:00Z ...

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now produce event rows. Well sort by order_id and timestamp. Lets compile events per order: Order 1001: - Order Created: 2024-01-01T09:00:00Z, resource Alice Brown. - Item Picked lines: ITEM-001: 2024-01-02T10:15:00Z, resource David Lin. ITEM-002: 2024-01-02T11:00:00Z, resource Eva Johnson. - Order Dispatched (DLV-5001): 2024-01-03T08:30:00Z, resource GlobalTransport. Order Arrived (DLV-5001): 2024-01-05T14:45:00Z ... Order 1002: ... Order 1003: ... Order 1004: Order Created ... Item Picked: ITEM-001 ... (No delivery, invoice, payment data for order 1004 (missing). Well still include events we have. Order 1005: ...

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Order Dispatched (DLV-5003) 2024-01-05T07:00:00Z Resource GlobalTransport (note: this dispatch is before arrival of DLV-5002? Actually dispatch 2024-01-05T07:00 is before arrival 2024-01-07T16:10, okay)

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Well use Resource column with the mapped name from Resources table where applicable; for carrier we have name; for sales person we have name; for warehouse staff we have name; for billing clerk we have name; for payment we could leave resource blank or put payment_method as attribute.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets map: Resource mapping: SP-001 Alice Brown SP-002 Bob Smith SP-003 Charlie Kim WH-001 David Lin WH-002 Eva Johnson WH-003 Frank Miller CR-01 GlobalTransport CR-02 FastShip CR-03 AirExpress BL-001 Gina Carter BL-002 Harry Lee BL-003 Irene Park

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Other Attributes column can be a JSON-like string or semicolon separated key=value. Well include for Item Picked: item_id, quantity. For Invoice Issued: invoice_amount. For Payment Received: payment_method, payment_reference. For Order Created: maybe customer_id, order_priority.
